manifest.name: Simple exporter for LLM

name: Simple exporter for LLM

releases.author: gogothegogo
releases.description:
### New Features
- **Tag Export Support:** Right-click tags in the Tag Pane or Notebook Navigator to export all related notes with tag hierarchy.
- **Granular Context Builder:** Remove individual notes or sub-tags directly from the tree view.
- **Dual Tree Export:** Shows both Tag Structure and Folder Structure when both contexts are used.
- **Improved Integration:** Robust context menu support for Notebook Navigator and native Obsidian views.
- **Bug Fixes:** Resolved UI locking issues in the Context Builder and ensured strict deduplication of exported notes.
releases.name: Release 1.3.0

releases.author: gogothegogo
